description: citizen believes that everyone deserves a watch that is truly individual and exceptional in character. Combining the newest technology with classic, sophisticated designs, this range of watches has something for everyone. If you're looking for a reliable timepiece which has an elegant, stylish look then your search is over!Case diameter: 21 mmCase thickness: 5 mmDial shape: RoundWarranty: Three yearsStainless steel round case with a golden bezelSteel strap with a butterfly claspWhite dial with golden handsBranding on the dialScrew to reset timeSolid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durabilityWater resistance up to 50 metres, allowing you to wear it even when showering
